themes: The backlog is heavily Manager-weighted with a long tail of overdue outreach — most contacts have been waiting 100+ days, signaling a systemic follow-up gap that needs a prioritized, tiered re-engagement plan.

Several accounts appear multiple times (Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Avenue5 Residential, Holiday Inn Express, Ford, Anytime Fitness, 29th Street Living, Neighborly, Vetcor, Cruise Planners, Willow Bridge, Balfour Beatty, LivCor, Garner, Orangetheory), suggesting either high engagement interest or unresolved pain points that warrant account-level coordination before individual outreach.

The contact list spans highly diverse verticals — hospitality, multifamily residential, fitness, food & beverage, automotive, travel, and home services — indicating that product feedback gathered will need to be segmented by industry to surface meaningful, actionable patterns rather than one-size-fits-all conclusions.
